reasoning: The B.C. government and BC Hydro excluded Tesla products from their EV charger rebate program on March 12, 2025, as part of a retaliatory measure linked to the US-Canada trade disputes (Trump's tariffs). Retaliatory measures of this scale are highly visible and are typically not reversed quickly unless the underlying trade issue is fully resolved. A guide published on July 7, 2025 (Metro EV guide) confirms that the ban is still in effect, stating that Tesla chargers are no longer eligible. Given that the resolution states the page must say they are ineligible on or after July 1, 2025, and we have evidence from July 7, 2025, it is overwhelmingly likely that this rule was indeed in place on the target dates. No evidence of policy reversal was found.
